data.title: GREEN: Create ui-designer payload contract
data.description:
## Testing Mode
testing_mode: GREEN
TDD exemption: criterion 3 (Markdown documentation, no executable assertion possible). Task 1 test_contract_schema_valid is the RED gate.

## Description
Create contract file with required structure (check-contract-schemas.sh enforces: level-1 heading starts with # Contract:, ## Purpose section present):
- # Contract: ui-designer-payload
- ## Purpose: defines payload schema for preplanning to dso:ui-designer dispatch
- ## Input: story ID, epic context, sibling designs, session file path
- ## Output: REVIEW_DECISION payload, CACHE_MISSING signal, scope_split_proposals
- ## CACHE_MISSING Signal: definition, trigger conditions, max 2 retry cycles
- ## REVIEW_DECISION Signal: field definitions, APPROVE vs REVISE, max 3 revision cycles

## File Impact
| File | Action |
|------|--------|
| plugins/dso/docs/contracts/ui-designer-payload.md | create |

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Contract passes schema validation
  Verify: plugins/dso/scripts/check-contract-schemas.sh plugins/dso/docs/contracts/ui-designer-payload.md

## Dependencies
Task 1 (RED gate: test_contract_schema_valid)
